item.title: The Popstroke Daytona Beach mega mini golf match! (Holes 13-15)
item.description: Follow a mini golf match at Popstroke Daytona Beach through holes 13–15, featuring competitive play, tricky shots, and putting challenges.

media:content.media:title: The Popstroke Daytona Beach mega mini golf match! (Holes 13-15)
media:content.media:description: Follow a mini golf match at Popstroke Daytona Beach through holes 13–15, featuring competitive play, tricky shots, and putting challenges.

item.title: Are These The World's Biggest Mini Golf Holes?!
item.description: Explore unusually large mini golf holes and course designs, highlighting scale, creativity, and challenging putting setups.

media:content.media:title: Are These The World's Biggest Mini Golf Holes?!
media:content.media:description: Explore unusually large mini golf holes and course designs, highlighting scale, creativity, and challenging putting setups.

item.title: The Popstroke Daytona Beach mega mini golf match! (Holes 10-12)
item.description: Watch a mini golf match at Popstroke Daytona Beach, featuring competitive play on select holes and exciting putting moments.

media:content.media:title: The Popstroke Daytona Beach mega mini golf match! (Holes 10-12)
media:content.media:description: Watch a mini golf match at Popstroke Daytona Beach, featuring competitive play on select holes and exciting putting moments.
